---
name: Task
about: A development task or chore for the Glint project
title: '[Task] '
labels: ['task']
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the work to be done.

## Motivation
Why is this task necessary? What problem does it solve or what feature does it enable?

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Implementation complete
- [ ] Tests written / updated
- [ ] TypeScript type-check passes (`npx wxt prepare && npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Manual tested on supported platforms
- [ ] Telemetry added (if applicable)

## Related
- **Depends on:** #...
- **Blocks:** #...
- **Related spec:** [link to SPECS.md section or PRD section]

## Additional Notes
Any implementation notes, technical decisions, or references.
